{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Social & Digital Media Content Creator & Strategist",
  "description": "Bible Davids Ministries (BDM) is a cutting-edge global outreach organization committed to transforming lives through the supernatural power of God, dynamic media, strategic evangelism, and community impact. As the evangelistic arm working hand-in-hand with Supernatural Nation, BDM is pioneering in television broadcasting, media production, publishing, education, humanitarian initiatives, and innovative call center operations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Social &amp; Digital Media Content Creator &amp; Strategist

Job Location: Abuja
Job Type: Full-time

Role Overview


	The Social &amp; Digital Media Content Creator &amp; Strategist will be the creative strategist and execution lead for BDM&rsquo;s online platforms.
	This role demands both creativity and analytics &mdash; crafting compelling content that carries the fire of the message while optimizing reach, growth, and engagement across Instagram, Facebook, X (Twitter), TikTok, and especially YouTube.
	You will oversee the full content lifecycle: planning, publishing, engagement, analytics, and growth. Working closely with the media production and campaigns team, you&rsquo;ll ensure that every post, clip, and broadcast reflects the anointed excellence of Bible Davids Ministries.


Key Responsibilities
Social Media Management:


	Develop and execute a dynamic social media strategy aligned with BDM&rsquo;s vision and campaigns.
	Plan and schedule daily/weekly posts across Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, X (Twitter), and LinkedIn.
	Repurpose ministry content (sermons, clips, devotionals, event footage) into platform-optimized posts.
	Engage with online audiences, respond to comments/messages, and foster digital community.
	Launch and manage campaigns for events, conferences, and courses across social media.


YouTube Channel Management:


	Oversee BDM&rsquo;s YouTube channel(s), ensuring regular uploads of sermons, clips, live streams, and shorts.
	Optimize video titles, descriptions, thumbnails, tags, and playlists for maximum discoverability.
	Work with the media team to create compelling intros, outros, and branded overlays.
	Monitor analytics and audience retention to refine content strategy.
	Implement monetization strategies and ensure compliance with YouTube policies.


Content Creation &amp; Collaboration:


	Collaborate with the graphics and video editing teams to produce visually stunning, Spirit-filled content.
	Brainstorm innovative content ideas (series, challenges, reels, shorts, livestream interactions).
	Ensure all content is consistent with BDM&rsquo;s brand identity and prophetic tone.


Analytics &amp; Growth:


	Track KPIs for all platforms (followers, engagement, reach, click-throughs, conversions).
	Prepare weekly/monthly reports with insights and recommendations.
	Identify trends and opportunities for viral content and campaign growth.
	Use analytics to guide strategy and ensure measurable impact.


Strategic Partnerships &amp; Community Building:


	Collaborate with influencers, partners, and digital communities to expand reach.
	Build subscriber engagement funnels through YouTube and social media.
	Drive online traffic to registration pages, donation portals, and discipleship platforms.


Qualifications &amp; Requirements
Education &amp; Experience:


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Marketing, Media, Communications, or related field.
	3+ years of proven experience managing social media accounts and/or YouTube channels.
	Strong portfolio of past work demonstrating growth and engagement.


Skills &amp; Competencies:


	Proficiency with scheduling and analytics tools (Meta Business Suite, TubeBuddy, Hootsuite, etc.).
	Strong storytelling ability with excellent copywriting skills.
	Knowledge of SEO, YouTube optimization, and paid advertising.
	Creative eye for trends, virality, and audience psychology.
	Video editing and thumbnail design skills are a strong advantage.


Spiritual Alignment:


	A committed believer with a passion for evangelism and Kingdom impact.
	Alignment with the prophetic and revival mandate of Bible Davids Ministries.
	A heart to serve through media as a tool of transformation.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume / CV and a&nbsp;cover letter explaining their relevant experience and why they believe they are called to serve at Bible Davids Ministries in Abuja&nbsp;to:&nbsp;hr@bibledavids.org&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",
  "datePosted": "2026-04-07",
  "validThrough": "2026-05-08",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

Social & Digital Media Content Creator & Strategist Job at Bible Davids Ministries (BDM)




        
    

        
        Bible Davids Ministries (BDM) is a cutting-edge global outreach organization committed to transforming lives through the supernatural power of God, dynamic media, strategic evangelism, and community impact. As the evangelistic arm working hand-in-hand with Supernatural Nation, BDM is pioneering in television broadcasting, media production, publishing, education, humanitarian initiatives, and innovative call center operations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social & Digital Media Content Creator & Strategist

Job Location: Abuja
Job Type: Full-time

Role Overview
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Social & Digital Media Content Creator & Strategist will be the creative strategist and execution lead for BDM’s online platforms.
	This role demands both creativity and analytics — crafting compelling content that carries the fire of the message while optimizing reach, growth, and engagement across Instagram, Facebook, X (Twitter), TikTok, and especially YouTube.
	You will oversee the full content lifecycle: planning, publishing, engagement, analytics, and growth. Working closely with the media production and campaigns team, you’ll ensure that every post, clip, and broadcast reflects the anointed excellence of Bible Davids Ministries.


Key Responsibilities
Social Media Management:


	Develop and execute a dynamic social media strategy aligned with BDM’s vision and campaigns.
	Plan and schedule daily/weekly posts across Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, X (Twitter), and LinkedIn.
	Repurpose ministry content (sermons, clips, devotionals, event footage) into platform-optimized posts.
	Engage with online audiences, respond to comments/messages, and foster digital community.
	Launch and manage campaigns for events, conferences, and courses across social media.


YouTube Channel Management:


	Oversee BDM’s YouTube channel(s), ensuring regular uploads of sermons, clips, live streams, and shorts.
	Optimize video titles, descriptions, thumbnails, tags, and playlists for maximum discoverability.
	Work with the media team to create compelling intros, outros, and branded overlays.
	Monitor analytics and audience retention to refine content strategy.
	Implement monetization strategies and ensure compliance with YouTube policies.


Content Creation & Collaboration:


	Collaborate with the graphics and video editing teams to produce visually stunning, Spirit-filled content.
	Brainstorm innovative content ideas (series, challenges, reels, shorts, livestream interactions).
	Ensure all content is consistent with BDM’s brand identity and prophetic tone.


Analytics & Growth:


	Track KPIs for all platforms (followers, engagement, reach, click-throughs, conversions).
	Prepare weekly/monthly reports with insights and recommendations.
	Identify trends and opportunities for viral content and campaign growth.
	Use analytics to guide strategy and ensure measurable impact.


Strategic Partnerships & Community Building:


	Collaborate with influencers, partners, and digital communities to expand reach.
	Build subscriber engagement funnels through YouTube and social media.
	Drive online traffic to registration pages, donation portals, and discipleship platforms.


Qualifications & Requirements
Education & Experience:


	Bachelor’s Degree in Marketing, Media, Communications, or related field.
	3+ years of proven experience managing social media accounts and/or YouTube channels.
	Strong portfolio of past work demonstrating growth and engagement.


Skills & Competencies:


	Proficiency with scheduling and analytics tools (Meta Business Suite, TubeBuddy, Hootsuite, etc.).
	Strong storytelling ability with excellent copywriting skills.
	Knowledge of SEO, YouTube optimization, and paid advertising.
	Creative eye for trends, virality, and audience psychology.
	Video editing and thumbnail design skills are a strong advantage.


Spiritual Alignment:


	A committed believer with a passion for evangelism and Kingdom impact.
	Alignment with the prophetic and revival mandate of Bible Davids Ministries.
	A heart to serve through media as a tool of transformation.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume / CV and a cover letter explaining their relevant experience and why they believe they are called to serve at Bible Davids Ministries in Abuja to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Content & Communications Specialist (AI-Focused)",
  "description": "Bible Davids Ministries (BDM) is a cutting-edge global outreach organization committed to transforming lives through the supernatural power of God, dynamic media, strategic evangelism, and community impact. As the evangelistic arm working hand-in-hand with Supernatural Nation, BDM is pioneering in television broadcasting, media production, publishing, education, humanitarian initiatives, and innovative call center operations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Content &amp; Communications Specialist (AI-Focused)

Job Location: Abuja
Job Type: Full-time

Role Overview


	The Content &amp; Communications Specialist (AI-Focused) is responsible for developing high-quality written content for digital, broadcast, and marketing platforms while also translating and localizing content for diverse global audiences.
	This role blends creative writing with technical proficiency in AI translation tools to ensure clarity, consistency, and cultural relevance across all communications.
	The ideal candidate is both a strong storyteller and a detail-oriented linguist, capable of maintaining the ministry&rsquo;s voice while adapting content for different regions and platforms.


Key Responsibilities


	Write compelling copy for campaigns, social media, websites, email marketing, broadcasts, and ministry materials
	Translate and localize content into multiple languages using AI-assisted tools while ensuring accuracy and cultural relevance
	Edit and proofread content to maintain high standards of clarity, grammar, tone, and consistency
	Adapt messaging for different audiences, platforms, and regions while preserving the ministry&rsquo;s voice and intent
	Collaborate with media, marketing, and leadership teams to align messaging with ministry initiatives
	Utilize AI tools to enhance productivity in writing, translation, and content optimization
	Maintain consistency in branding, terminology, and messaging across all communications
	Assist in developing scripts, captions, subtitles, and written materials for video and broadcast content
	Review and refine AI-generated translations to ensure quality and contextual accuracy
	Stay updated on trends in copywriting, AI tools, and multilingual communication


Qualifications &amp; Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Communications, Journalism, Linguistics, Marketing, or a related field (preferred)
	3&ndash;5 years of experience in copywriting, content creation, or translation
	Exceptional writing, editing, and proofreading skills
	Strong proficiency in at least one additional language beyond English (highly preferred)
	Experience using AI tools for writing and translation (e.g., ChatGPT, DeepL, or similar platforms)
	Understanding of tone, voice, and audience targeting across different platforms
	Strong attention to detail and commitment to high-quality content
	Ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines in a fast-paced environment
	Excellent communication and collaboration skills
	Experience in a ministry, nonprofit, media, or faith-based organization is highly preferred
	Personal alignment with the mission, values, and spiritual foundation of Bible Davids Ministries is essential.


Compensation &amp; Benefits


	Competitive salary commensurate with experience.
	Opportunities for spiritual, professional, and creative growth.
	The privilege of working in a Spirit-filled, innovative ministry with a global reach.
	Access to leadership training and personal development resources within BDM.
	The chance to see your creative work impacting thousands across television, social media, and live events.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume / CV and a&nbsp;cover letter explaining their relevant experience and why they believe they are called to serve at Bible Davids Ministries in Abuja&nbsp;to:&nbsp;hr@bibledavids.org&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Experienced House Manager (Live",
  "description": "Stephanie Nicholas Solutions is a locally-owned company foundedin2019, specializingin providing professional cleaning services, facility maintenance, fumigation, furnishing and finishing for companies and organizations.

Its mission is to create clean and healthy work spaces through world-class facility management and cleaning techniques, ensuring customer satisfaction with innovation and a hands-on approach.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Experienced House Manager (Live in)

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a highly experienced, hands-on House Manager to oversee the smooth day-to-day running of a private household.
	The ideal candidate must be a skilled cook, exceptionally detail-oriented, and self-aware, with a strong sense of responsibility and professionalism.
	This role requires someone who leads by example, maintains high standards, and takes full ownership of household operations.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage and coordinate all household activities to ensure efficiency and order
	Prepare high-quality meals consistently (local and continental dishes)
	Supervise and support domestic staff, ensuring duties are carried out to standard
	Maintain cleanliness, organization, and presentation of the home always
	Monitor household supplies and handle inventory, procurement, and restocking
	Ensure proper care and maintenance of household equipment and facilities
	Handle schedules, errands, and any assigned administrative household tasks
	Uphold strict confidentiality and professionalism at all times.


Requirements


	Proven experience as a House Manager or in a similar senior domestic role
	Strong cooking skills (must be confident preparing a variety of meals)
	Hands-on approach with a willingness to actively participate in daily tasks
	High level of self-awareness, initiative, and accountability
	Exceptional attention to detail and organizational skills
	Ability to manage staff effectively and maintain discipline respectfully
	Good communication skills and a calm, problem-solving mindset
	Trustworthy, discreet, and reliable.


Preferred Qualities:


	Ability to work with minimal supervision
	Strong work ethic and a proactive attitude
	Flexibility and adaptability to changing household needs.


Salary
N350,000 - N400,000 monthly.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their CV and a brief cover letter outlining relevant experience&nbsp;to:&nbsp;snsolutions690@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: For more enquires; WhatsApp 08129982839.",

Experienced House Manager (Live in) Job at Stephanie Nicholas Solutions




        
    

        
        Stephanie Nicholas Solutions is a locally-owned company foundedin2019, specializingin providing professional cleaning services, facility maintenance, fumigation, furnishing and finishing for companies and organizations.

Its mission is to create clean and healthy work spaces through world-class facility management and cleaning techniques, ensuring customer satisfaction with innovation and a hands-on approach.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Experienced House Manager (Live in)

Job Location: Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a highly experienced, hands-on House Manager to oversee the smooth day-to-day running of a private household.
	The ideal candidate must be a skilled cook, exceptionally detail-oriented, and self-aware, with a strong sense of responsibility and professionalism.
	This role requires someone who leads by example, maintains high standards, and takes full ownership of household operations.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage and coordinate all household activities to ensure efficiency and order
	Prepare high-quality meals consistently (local and continental dishes)
	Supervise and support domestic staff, ensuring duties are carried out to standard
	Maintain cleanliness, organization, and presentation of the home always
	Monitor household supplies and handle inventory, procurement, and restocking
	Ensure proper care and maintenance of household equipment and facilities
	Handle schedules, errands, and any assigned administrative household tasks
	Uphold strict confidentiality and professionalism at all times.


Requirements


	Proven experience as a House Manager or in a similar senior domestic role
	Strong cooking skills (must be confident preparing a variety of meals)
	Hands-on approach with a willingness to actively participate in daily tasks
	High level of self-awareness, initiative, and accountability
	Exceptional attention to detail and organizational skills
	Ability to manage staff effectively and maintain discipline respectfully
	Good communication skills and a calm, problem-solving mindset
	Trustworthy, discreet, and reliable.


Preferred Qualities:


	Ability to work with minimal supervision
	Strong work ethic and a proactive attitude
	Flexibility and adaptability to changing household needs.


Salary
N350,000 - N400,000 monthly. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their CV and a brief cover letter outlining relevant experience to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: For more enquires; WhatsApp 08129982839.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Digital Engagement Intern (NYSC or Pre-NYSC)",
  "description": "eHealth4everyone is a digital health enterprise based in Nigeria (Africa) contributing to health service delivery using data science and information technology. At ehealth4everyone, our goal is saving lives and our approach is information and technology. We believe that if health is a right, proven digital health solutions and expertise such as ours should not be a privilege.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Engagement Intern (NYSC or Pre-NYSC)

Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Internship

Job Summary


	The Digital marketer is needed to help maintain an online presence for the company by marketing and engaging our products/services through our social media platforms.


Responsibilities


	Develop email marketing campaigns directed at the different segments of our client base
	Plan and execute all web, search engine optimization and display advertising campaigns
	Develop and implement a social media marketing strategy
	Develop and execute content marketing strategies
	Create and publish Google Ads
	Conduct SEO audits of company websites
	Measure and report performance of all digital marketing campaigns, and assess against goals (ROI and KPIs)
	Liaise and build relationships with media/digital advertising agencies
	Research trends in digital marketing and make recommendations for strategic growth
	Support content development.


Qualifications&nbsp;and Skills


	Educated to at least a Degree level.
	At least six months of experience in digital marketing.
	Experience in commercial activities in a technology or health setting would be advantageous but not a requirement.
	Good knowledge of all different digital marketing channels
	Good knowledge and experience with online marketing tools
	Good knowledge of Youtube and Google Ads.
	Best practices, hands-on experience with SEO, Google Analytics etc.
	Please Note: Applicants must have a diverse portfolio demonstrating mastery of their craft and a track record of results to be included on their resume or presented when required.
	This position is available for hybrid and freelance arrangements.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-04-07",
  "validThrough": "2026-05-08",
  "employmentType": "Intern",

    "@type": "Organization",

  },

Digital Engagement Intern (NYSC or Pre-NYSC) Job at eHealth4everyone




        
    

        
        eHealth4everyone is a digital health enterprise based in Nigeria (Africa) contributing to health service delivery using data science and information technology. At ehealth4everyone, our goal is saving lives and our approach is information and technology. We believe that if health is a right, proven digital health solutions and expertise such as ours should not be a privilege.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Engagement Intern (NYSC or Pre-NYSC)

Job Location: Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Internship

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Digital marketer is needed to help maintain an online presence for the company by marketing and engaging our products/services through our social media platforms.


Responsibilities


	Develop email marketing campaigns directed at the different segments of our client base
	Plan and execute all web, search engine optimization and display advertising campaigns
	Develop and implement a social media marketing strategy
	Develop and execute content marketing strategies
	Create and publish Google Ads
	Conduct SEO audits of company websites
	Measure and report performance of all digital marketing campaigns, and assess against goals (ROI and KPIs)
	Liaise and build relationships with media/digital advertising agencies
	Research trends in digital marketing and make recommendations for strategic growth
	Support content development.


Qualifications and Skills


	Educated to at least a Degree level.
	At least six months of experience in digital marketing.
	Experience in commercial activities in a technology or health setting would be advantageous but not a requirement.
	Good knowledge of all different digital marketing channels
	Good knowledge and experience with online marketing tools
	Good knowledge of Youtube and Google Ads.
	Best practices, hands-on experience with SEO, Google Analytics etc.
	Please Note: Applicants must have a diverse portfolio demonstrating mastery of their craft and a track record of results to be included on their resume or presented when required.
	This position is available for hybrid and freelance arrangements.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "Inventory Officer",
  "description": "Eko Maintenance Limited is a rapidly growing Facility Management Company that specializes in the maintenance of high-rise building facilities with an office located in Victoria Island, Lagos.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Inventory Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Receive and Store Goods: Receive incoming goods, store them appropriately, and ensure they are issued correctly.
	Manage Stock Levels: Monitor and manage stock levels to ensure adequate supplies are available.
	Distribute Supplies: Distribute supplies from stock as needed by different departments.
	Maintain Stock Records: Keep accurate stock records using both manual and computerized systems.
	Coordinate Inventory Functions: Use Excel sheets to coordinate and track inventory functions.
	Track Inventory Movements: Monitor the movement of materials and products in and out of the inventory through accurate record-keeping.
	Store Management: Keep track of goods and supplies within the store, ensuring everything is properly organized and accessible.


Qualification / Requirement


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree or Higher National Diploma (HND) in Business Administration, Supply chain management or related field.
	Experience: 2 &ndash; 3 years of working experience in a related field.
	Proficiency in inventory software, ERP system, Microsoft Suite ( Excel, word, Outlook)
	Organizational Skills: Excellent organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple tasks simultaneously.
	Communication Skills: Strong communication skills for effective interaction with team members and other departments.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to:&nbsp;recruitment2@ekomaintenance.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Inventory Officer Job at Eko Maintenance Limited




        
    

        
        Eko Maintenance Limited is a rapidly growing Facility Management Company that specializes in the maintenance of high-rise building facilities with an office located in Victoria Island, Lagos.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Inventory Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Receive and Store Goods: Receive incoming goods, store them appropriately, and ensure they are issued correctly.
	Manage Stock Levels: Monitor and manage stock levels to ensure adequate supplies are available.
	Distribute Supplies: Distribute supplies from stock as needed by different departments.
	Maintain Stock Records: Keep accurate stock records using both manual and computerized systems.
	Coordinate Inventory Functions: Use Excel sheets to coordinate and track inventory functions.
	Track Inventory Movements: Monitor the movement of materials and products in and out of the inventory through accurate record-keeping.
	Store Management: Keep track of goods and supplies within the store, ensuring everything is properly organized and accessible.


Qualification / Requirement


	Bachelor’s Degree or Higher National Diploma (HND) in Business Administration, Supply chain management or related field.
	Experience: 2 – 3 years of working experience in a related field.
	Proficiency in inventory software, ERP system, Microsoft Suite ( Excel, word, Outlook)
	Organizational Skills: Excellent organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple tasks simultaneously.
	Communication Skills: Strong communication skills for effective interaction with team members and other departments.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
